name: Shaker Sugar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix the flour and brown sugar and spread evenly in the bottom of the unbaked pie shell.
2. Pour the cream and vanilla over the mixture.
3. Slice the butter into 12-16 pieces and distribute evenly over the top of the pie.
4. Sprinkle with nutmeg.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 40-45 minutes, or until firm.
